list.name: year
list.label: Year
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT year::text FROM accident_summary WHERE year IS NOT NULL ORDER BY year DESC

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(count) FROM accident_summary WHERE year = $year AND district IS NOT NULL;
SELECT SUM(count) FROM accident_summary WHERE year = $year AND district IS NOT NULL AND severity = 'Fatal';
SELECT SUM(count) FROM accident_summary WHERE year = $year AND district IS NOT NULL AND severity = 'Serious';
SELECT SUM(count) FROM accident_summary WHERE year = $year AND road_condition = 'Wet';
SELECT district, SUM(count) AS total_accidents FROM accident_summary WHERE year = $year AND district IS NOT NULL GROUP BY district ORDER BY total_accidents DESC LIMIT 10;

panels.title: Road Condition Impact: Wet vs Dry ($year)

targets.rawSql: SELECT road_condition, SUM(CASE WHEN severity = 'Fatal' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS "Fatal", SUM(CASE WHEN severity = 'Serious' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS "Serious", SUM(CASE WHEN severity = 'Slight' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS "Slight" FROM accident_summary WHERE year = $year AND road_condition IS NOT NULL AND road_condition != 'Unknown' GROUP BY road_condition ORDER BY road_condition;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN REGEXP_REPLACE(accident_type, '\s*/\s*', '/') = 'Vehicle/Vehicle' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS "Vehicle/Vehicle", SUM(CASE WHEN REGEXP_REPLACE(accident_type, '\s*/\s*', '/') = 'Vehicle/None' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS "Vehicle/None", SUM(CASE WHEN REGEXP_REPLACE(accident_type, '\s*/\s*', '/') = 'Vehicle/Pedestrian' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS "Vehicle/Pedestrian", SUM(CASE WHEN REGEXP_REPLACE(accident_type, '\s*/\s*', '/') = 'Vehicle/Object' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS "Vehicle/Object" FROM accident_summary WHERE year = $year AND accident_type IS NOT NULL;

SELECT make_date(year, 6, 15) AS time, REGEXP_REPLACE(accident_type, '\s*/\s*', '/') AS metric, SUM(count) AS value FROM accident_summary WHERE year IS NOT NULL AND severity = 'Fatal' AND accident_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY year, REGEXP_REPLACE(accident_type, '\s*/\s*', '/') ORDER BY year;

SELECT make_date(year, 6, 15) AS time, severity AS metric, SUM(count) AS value FROM accident_summary WHERE year IS NOT NULL AND accident_type IS NOT NULL AND severity != 'All' GROUP BY year, severity ORDER BY year;
SELECT LPAD(hour_of_day::text, 2, '0') || ':00' AS hour, SUM(count) AS accidents FROM accident_summary WHERE year = $year AND hour_of_day IS NOT NULL GROUP BY hour_of_day ORDER BY hour_of_day;

panels.title: Avg Accidents per Day: Wet vs Dry Road ($year)
panels.description: Average number of accidents per day under each road surface condition. Dry days estimated at 235/year, wet road days at 130/year (HK Observatory average). Shows whether wet conditions lead to more accidents per day despite lower total volume.

targets.rawSql: SELECT t.road_condition, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.severity='Fatal' THEN t.total ELSE 0 END)::numeric / CASE WHEN t.road_condition='Wet' THEN w.wet_days ELSE w.dry_days END, 2) AS "Fatal", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.severity='Serious' THEN t.total ELSE 0 END)::numeric / CASE WHEN t.road_condition='Wet' THEN w.wet_days ELSE w.dry_days END, 2) AS "Serious", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.severity='Slight' THEN t.total ELSE 0 END)::numeric / CASE WHEN t.road_condition='Wet' THEN w.wet_days ELSE w.dry_days END, 2) AS "Slight" FROM (SELECT road_condition, severity, SUM(count) AS total FROM accident_summary WHERE year=$year AND road_condition IN ('Dry','Wet') AND severity IN ('Fatal','Serious','Slight') GROUP BY road_condition, severity) t JOIN weather_annual_stats w ON w.year=$year GROUP BY t.road_condition, w.wet_days, w.dry_days ORDER BY t.road_condition DESC;
